---
title: "Batch effec removal"
date: 2023-05-25
# date-modified: 2023-04-05
categories:
  - PCA
# image: pca_biplot.png
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
    # fig.width = 6, 
    # fig.height = 3.8,
    fig.align = "center", 
    # fig.retina = 3,
    # out.width = "85%", 
    collapse = TRUE
)
```

```{r}
pacman::p_load(
    sva,
    limma,
    edgeR   
)
```


```{r}
# url <- "http://bioinf.wehi.edu.au/edgeR/UserGuideData/arab.rds"
# destfile <- "blog/2023/05/25/arab.rds"
# download.file(url,destfile = destfile)
# Import the input r dataset
# raw_counts_matrix <- readRDS(destfile)
# head(raw_counts_matrix)
```



## Reference

- [Insights from a billion correlations](https://peterlangfelder.com/2018/12/02/removal-of-unwanted-variation-based-on-a-subset-of-samples/)

- [Transformation, Normalization, and Batch Effect Removal](https://bio-protocol.org/exchange/protocoldetail?id=4462&type=1)
